name: flowmind
description: Memory-driven web automation that learns, replays, and tests flows

scripts.build: npx esbuild flowmind.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=flowmind.js --bundle --external:playwright --external:better-sqlite3 --external:chalk --external:uuid --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk && npx esbuild mcp-server.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=mcp-server.js --bundle --external:playwright --external:better-sqlite3 --external:uuid --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk
